hypothesis_en: Mrs Gill, your remark seems to me to be very reasonable and I thank you for it. There were no requests for a hearing. I will convey your point of view to the political groups, because if you think it appropriate that we listen to the suggestion you make to us tomorrow, but now we have already begun the vote and we cannot interrupt it. Of course, the vote is open.
reference_en: that seems a (1.48) very sensible observation Mrs Gill thank you for that (1.97) we'll forward your views to the political groups (1.04) and (1.46) we'll see if we can accede to your suggestion tomorrow with the election of the Quaestors as you said yourself we can't obviously interrupt this vote now which has already begun ((Chairman starts speaking)) por supuesto el voto está abierto ((Chairman stops speaking)) the vote is open of course
source_es: Señora Gill su observación me parece muy puesta en razón me parece muy puesta en razón y se la agradezco no había peticiones de formular audiencia transmitiré su punto de vista a los Grupos políticos porque si les por si les parece adecuado que mañana atendamos a la sugerencia que nos hace pero ahora ya hemos empezado la votación y no podemos interrumpirla por supuesto el voto está abierto
